name: Jam Filled Spice Cookie
recipeInstructions:
About 2 1/2 hours before serving or up to 1 week ahead:
1. In a large bowl, beat butter and sugar until light and fluffy using medium speed.
2. Beat in flour and remaining ingredients except preserves with low speed until well combined, scraping the bowl frequently with a rubber spatula.
3. Shape dough into a ball and wrap tightly with plastic wrap. Refrigerate for about 1 hour to make it easier to handle.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. On a lightly floured surface, roll out half of the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch using a floured rolling pin.
6. Cut rounds with a 2 1/2-inch cookie cutter and then cut out centers with a 3/4-inch round cookie cutter.
7. Place cookies about 1/2 inch apart on ungreased baking sheets.
8. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes or until lightly browned, using a pancake turner to remove the cookies to wire racks to cool.
9. Repeat with remaining dough and trimmings.
10. To assemble cookies, spoon about 3/4 teaspoon preserves into the center of each cookie without a cut-out. Place a cookie with a cut-out over the preserves and gently press together. Store in a tightly covered container and use within 1 week.
